# AEOTPTextField

Vendored from <https://github.com/AbdelrhmanKamalEliwa/AEOTPTextField> at
commit `e77e26bbca8459741bd400712273000bab00ddda` under the MIT License.

The UIKit implementation is adapted for Swift 6, strict numeric input, and
the Pedals visual theme. The control retains a single native `UITextField`
for keyboard, paste, and one-time-code behavior while rendering one visual
slot per digit.
